verification_scope: official-source fields populated and publisher-wide official sources mapped; mutable journal-specific rules require live verification before submission

journals.title: IEEE Access
journals.verification_status: official-source fields populated in v0.8.0; live verification required before submission

journal_official_rule: journal author instructions / Guide for Authors / Information for Authors
template_paper_observation: open-access template-paper structural observations only, when included

official_link_health.reason: Release build is offline-friendly; run scripts/check_official_links_live.py --live in a networked environment.

source_refresh_policy.cadence: quarterly or before each public release
source_refresh_policy.release_build_network_policy: offline-friendly by default; CI uses dry-run unless maintainers opt into --live

maintenance_policy.offline_safe_policy: Do not mark unchecked sources as healthy in offline release builds.
